creator: lwhsu@lwhsu.org
text:
- Update to 0.90.0
- Fix depends on devel/py-pytz, it has been packed as an egg
- USE_PYTHON=yes, there is no python2.2 in ports tree
- Remove 4.x stuff
- Use USE_TCL, USE_TK, and some variables in bsd.tcl.mk
- Adjust EXAMPLESDIR
- Use static pkg-plist

Added file(s):
- pkg-plist

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-src::mplutils.cpp

Port maintainer (mainland@apeiron.net) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
